title: Mary the Tasmanian Devil Escaped a Zoo. It Took 2 Weeks to Find Her.
script: Mary the Tasmanian devil vanished! On June 2, at Paradise Country theme park on Queensland's Gold Coast, Mary the Tasmanian devil made one abnormally large leap out of her quarantine enclosure and disappeared. Park rangers, tracker dogs, and thermal-imaging drones searched for two weeks. Nothing. Then a family's security camera caught something small and black moving through the bushland in Oxenford — about 2 kilometers from the park. It was Mary. Searchers found her in unstable condition and rushed her to a specialist veterinary hospital, where staff stabilized her. Two weeks on her own in the Australian bush — a place where everything is actively trying to kill everything else. Mary survived. Which is impressive — because Tasmanian devils are listed as endangered. There are maybe 20,000 left. So what did Mary eat out there?
